metadata.description: Register for a free recurring wellness meetup event in Austin on Eventbrite

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction:
Search for the 'Hearts2Heal Monthly Wellness Meetup' event in Austin, TX on Eventbrite and register for the next available date.

Note: The event is free and held on the 4th Tuesday of each month at Capital Factory, Austin TX. Event URL: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/hearts2heal-monthly-wellness-meetup-tickets-1983102574183
